title: Even more random hypothetical personality bender
display_title: Even more random hypothetical personality bender
wikitext:
[]: Even more random hypothetical: personality bender?             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Mon Sep 01, 2008 7:32 pm What would happen if everyone in Eva had the exact opposite personality? For example, what if Shinji was incredibly hotblooded? What if Rei was basically Brian Blessed in a female body? What if Asuka was calm and collected to a near-absurd degree? What if Gendo was a hippie "love freak" who doted on Shinji at every possible opportunity? What if Misato was a hardworking teetotaler?

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Sep 01, 2008 7:34 pm

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Mon Sep 01, 2008 7:35 pm What? It's an idea that came into my head at random, and as far as I know Chit-Chat is the appropriate forum for this sort of random idea.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Sep 01, 2008 7:37 pm I am not saying that it does not fit, it does, but that emoticon conveys my opinion. This topic takes a lot of thinking. I am neither for nor against it. I am done here, continue on, good sir.

[]: Re: Even more random hypothetical: personality bender?             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Sep 01, 2008 7:44 pm SeanTucker wrote: What would happen if everyone in Eva had the exact opposite personality?

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Mon Sep 01, 2008 8:06 pm The thing is, that "Shinji with a spine" thing only applies to Shinji, and it just makes him a jackass rather than the exact opposite of his original self. Plus, most doujinshi and fanfics that I've read only invert the Eva pilots' personalities. The secondary characters are generally left untouched.

[]:             Quote Post by swamp147 » Mon Sep 01, 2008 8:18 pm Rei would be like she was in the alternate universe in episode 26. Which would be pretty awesome. Yui would be a total dick. Kaji would be introverted and embarrassed/awkward/uncomfortable around females. Keel would be a fun loving guy who loves to collect beanie babies. Maya would be addicted to gorefest horror movies. More to come if I feel bored?

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Mon Sep 01, 2008 8:19 pm You would have every other mecha anime out there.

[]:             Quote Post by Zerogoki » Tue Sep 02, 2008 1:41 pm Aoba would be cheerful, and Toji would be camper than a row of pink tents at Pride!

[]: Re: Even more random hypothetical: personality bender?             Quote Post by simon » Tue Sep 02, 2008 2:57 pm SeanTucker wrote: For example, what if Shinji was incredibly hotblooded?

[]: Re: Even more random hypothetical: personality bender?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Sep 02, 2008 3:39 pm simon wrote: A Jesus role needs a Jesus type person.

[]: Re: Even more random hypothetical: personality bender?             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Tue Sep 02, 2008 7:36 pm Mr. Tines wrote: simon wrote: A Jesus role needs a Jesus type person.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion__x » Wed Sep 03, 2008 1:39 am CorporalChaos wrote: You would have every other mecha anime out there.

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Thu Sep 04, 2008 1:51 pm I'm guessing the Angels would all huddle together like cowards, Asuka would hang back and watch/direct Units 01 and 00 whilst they charged around absolutely kicking every single enemy they encountered, NERV would be a total mess, SEELE would be something like the muppets' club with stuffed toys everywhere, Kaworu would demolish the entire place with his abilities, Kaji would be every bit the guy from "Get Smart", Misato would be that teacher from "女王の教室" (The Queen's Classroom), Touji would be gay, and 3I would NEVER happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Sep 04, 2008 2:45 pm The thing is, that "Shinji with a spine" thing only applies to Shinji, and it just makes him a jackass rather than the exact opposite of his original self.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Sep 04, 2008 5:01 pm bizzarro-Shinji = Asuka w/o chesticles.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Sep 04, 2008 5:19 pm That's a nice way to sum it up.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Fri Sep 05, 2008 6:21 am You would end up with 90% of doujinshi and fanfics.

[]: Re: Even more random hypothetical: personality bender?             Quote Post by Enki v.2 » Fri Sep 05, 2008 12:54 pm SeanTucker wrote: What if Gendo was a hippie "love freak" who doted on Shinji at every possible opportunity? What if Misato was a hardworking teetotaler?

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Fri Sep 05, 2008 1:03 pm ^^ LOL!!
